name: Nyaruko
description: A Nyarlotephian, who has come to Earth on a mission to protect Mahiro. Nyaruko has a bright personality, as she is always shown to be happy and rarely down. She likes anime, manga, games, and superhero shows. She has perverted thoughts that usually revolve around Mahiro, whom she says to love.

name: Rika Hoshizaki

She has one red eye, long silver hair, and a black eye patch over her left eye. name: Medusa Gorgon
nativeName: メデューサ・ゴーゴン
description: One of the major antagonists of the series, Medusa is a powerful witch and the middle sibling among the three Gorgon Sisters. She is the mother of Crona, who is also the crown jewel in her master plan: the destruction of the current world order to get the planet back on track. Lacking empathy for others, along with possessing a twisted sense of love for those who are like her in personality, Medusa views everyone as a potential specimen to experiment on or as a tool to suit her purpose.
